sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93100" key="sa/kos1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάκος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n93100.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σάκκος</ref></xr>. </sense> <sense n="B" id="n93100.1" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σᾱκός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σηκός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
